name: Adapt
descriptionsHtml: You may shift up to 2 stat points (except Toughness). The minimum is 3 and maximum is 9.
descriptionsText: You may shift up to 2 stat points (except Toughness). The minimum is 3 and maximum is 9.

name: Alchemic Barrage (Backpack)
descriptionsHtml: Fires a barrage of missiles, making a light attack with arcane damage against all targets in line of sight.  Has a bonus +10 to accuracy.
descriptionsText: Fires a barrage of missiles, making a light attack with arcane damage against all targets in line of sight.  Has a bonus +10 to accuracy.

name: Alchemic Barrage II (Backpack)
requirementsHtml: Can only be used when less than half health or if one body party is destroyed.
requirementsText: Can only be used when less than half health or if one body party is destroyed.
descriptionsHtml: Mark a target at the end of this creature's turn if there is no mark.  Activates again at the start of the creature's turn.  Fires a barrage of light attacks equal to the amount of party members at the marked target equal to the amount of party members and then mark another target.  Has a +10 to accuracy.  If the target is no longer a valid target, trigger the effects of Alchemic Barrage (Backpack) instead, and then mark another target.
descriptionsText: Mark a target at the end of this creature's turn if there is no mark.  Activates again at the start of the creature's turn.  Fires a barrage of light attacks equal to the amount of party members at the marked target equal to the amount of party members and then mark another target.  Has a +10 to accuracy.  If the target is no longer a valid target, trigger the effects of Alchemic Barrage (Backpack) instead, and then mark another target.

name: Alchemic Flare (Body)
descriptionsHtml:
Creates an area filled with explosive gas, contained by the wall of Transmute Low Wall (Body).

If an area of gas already exists from a previous turn, ignite the gas into a fireball dealing heavy attack fire damage in the entire area that the gas was in.  Sure Hit.
descriptionsText:
Creates an area filled with explosive gas, contained by the wall of Transmute Low Wall (Body).

If an area of gas already exists from a previous turn, ignite the gas into a fireball dealing heavy attack fire damage in the entire area that the gas was in.  Sure Hit.

name: Ancestor's Blessing
requirementsText: Reduced to 25% HP or less.
descriptionsHtml:
Upon being critically injured, you draw upon the ancestral strength of past leaders to empower and restore yourself.

Restores Half of your currently missing HP and grants you 2 additional AP on your next turn.
descriptionsText:
Upon being critically injured, you draw upon the ancestral strength of past leaders to empower and restore yourself.

Restores Half of your currently missing HP and grants you 2 additional AP on your next turn.

name: Angel's Embrace
descriptionsHtml:
You grant the target ally Angel’s Embrace granting a shield against the triggering attack that blocks damage equal to 2 + (2 x Toughness)

This spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
descriptionsText:
You grant the target ally Angel’s Embrace granting a shield against the triggering attack that blocks damage equal to 2 + (2 x Toughness)

This spell does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Arcane Fang
descriptionsHtml: Your bite channels internal magic. You make a Light Attack that deals Arcane damage. On damage, the target becomes Dazed. If the target is already Dazed, this attack instead deals an additional 8 full pierce Arcane damage as the lingering magic intensifies.
descriptionsText: Your bite channels internal magic. You make a Light Attack that deals Arcane damage. On damage, the target becomes Dazed. If the target is already Dazed, this attack instead deals an additional 8 full pierce Arcane damage as the lingering magic intensifies.

name: Arcane Net
descriptionsHtml: You place a 20x20ft net of arcane energy at a point within range. The net is considered difficult terrain for your enemies. You may spend 0 RP to cancel the net, immediately rooting all creatures within the net’s area of effect at that time until the start of your next turn.
descriptionsText: You place a 20x20ft net of arcane energy at a point within range. The net is considered difficult terrain for your enemies. You may spend 0 RP to cancel the net, immediately rooting all creatures within the net’s area of effect at that time until the start of your next turn.

name: Astra Beams
descriptionsHtml: You make X separate Light attacks that deal Astra damage against the target. If your Absorb Magic trait is active, you gain the Power bonus for each of these attacks and the element changes to that of the magic absorbed.
descriptionsText: You make X separate Light attacks that deal Astra damage against the target. If your Absorb Magic trait is active, you gain the Power bonus for each of these attacks and the element changes to that of the magic absorbed.

name: Backstab
requirementsText: Target must be unaware of you
descriptionsHtml: You make a Heavy attack against the target.
descriptionsText: You make a Heavy attack against the target.

name: Bandersnatch Swipe
requirementsHtml: Can only be used while your HP is at 25% or lower.
requirementsText: Can only be used while your HP is at 25% or lower.
descriptionsHtml: You swipe at the nearest enemy and toss them 30ft away in a direction of your choice. The target passes through allies for this movement, but will collide with walls. If they hit a wall, they take 1d4 true damage and are dazed until the start of your next turn.
descriptionsText: You swipe at the nearest enemy and toss them 30ft away in a direction of your choice. The target passes through allies for this movement, but will collide with walls. If they hit a wall, they take 1d4 true damage and are dazed until the start of your next turn.

name: Bestial Command
requirementsText: Target must be summoned by you.
descriptionsHtml: The target may immediately spend their AP as if they had taken their turn.
descriptionsText: The target may immediately spend their AP as if they had taken their turn.

name: Black Knight's Charge
requirementsText: Must be mounted.
descriptionsHtml:
You may move up to twice your movement in a straight line towards a target further than 20ft away and gain Trample after moving at least 20ft. While under the effects of trample, you don't provoke attacks of opportunity by moving and you can move into enemies that are at least one size smaller than your mount. An enemy may spend 1 RP to move out of the way to an empty spot within 5ft of them.

If they don’t move out of the way, you make a Sure Hit Light attack against them. On damage, you knock them prone into the square you came from and keep moving, occupying the square they were in. Otherwise your movement action ends.

When you reach the target you make a Heavy attack against them. On damage, you may select a different target further than 20ft away, moving towards them and repeating this attack at no additional cost. You may only do this once.
descriptionsText:
You may move up to twice your movement in a straight line towards a target further than 20ft away and gain Trample after moving at least 20ft. While under the effects of trample, you don't provoke attacks of opportunity by moving and you can move into enemies that are at least one size smaller than your mount. An enemy may spend 1 RP to move out of the way to an empty spot within 5ft of them.

If they don’t move out of the way, you make a Sure Hit Light attack against them. On damage, you knock them prone into the square you came from and keep moving, occupying the square they were in. Otherwise your movement action ends.

When you reach the target you make a Heavy attack against them. On damage, you may select a different target further than 20ft away, moving towards them and repeating this attack at no additional cost. You may only do this once.

name: Blink
descriptionsHtml: You teleport to an empty space within range. The next basic Heavy attack you make has it AP cost reduced to 0.
descriptionsText: You teleport to an empty space within range. The next basic Heavy attack you make has it AP cost reduced to 0.

name: Blizzard
descriptionsHtml:
You create a blizzard in a 160ft radius centered on top of you. Any creature in the blizzard that is not immune to frost damage becomes slowed and has their vision reduced to 15ft.

 

Having a suitable heat source nearby or otherwise being protected from the cold removes the slowed effect given by this ability.
descriptionsText:
You create a blizzard in a 160ft radius centered on top of you. Any creature in the blizzard that is not immune to frost damage becomes slowed and has their vision reduced to 15ft.

Having a suitable heat source nearby or otherwise being protected from the cold removes the slowed effect given by this ability.

name: Blizzard Walker
requirementsText: Must be in a blizzard.
descriptionsHtml: You Sidestep up to double your speed. Afterwards, you may stealth for 0 AP. Cannot be used in the same turn as Snow Assassin.
descriptionsText: You Sidestep up to double your speed. Afterwards, you may stealth for 0 AP. Cannot be used in the same turn as Snow Assassin.

name: Boar Charge
descriptionsHtml:
You move up to 4 times your movement speed in a straight line and make a Heavy attack against the target. This attack deals maximum heavy damage if it hits. If it misses, the target moves out of the way and you keep charging until you’ve reached your max movement or until you hit a target or object. All of your movement with this ability does not provoke attacks of opportunity. 

Requires at least 10ft of unimposed movement to start.
descriptionsText:
You move up to 4 times your movement speed in a straight line and make a Heavy attack against the target. This attack deals maximum heavy damage if it hits. If it misses, the target moves out of the way and you keep charging until you’ve reached your max movement or until you hit a target or object. All of your movement with this ability does not provoke attacks of opportunity.

Requires at least 10ft of unimposed movement to start.

name: Boar Trample
requirementsText: Must be mounted.
descriptionsHtml:
You may move up to three times your movement in a straight line and gain Trample for this movement. While under the effects of trample, you don't provoke attacks of opportunity by moving and can move into enemies that are at least one size smaller than your mount. An enemy may spend 1 RP to move out of the way to an empty spot within 5ft of them.

If they don’t move out of the way, you make a Sure Hit Light attack against the,. On damage, you knock them prone into the square you came from and keep moving, occupying the square they were in. Otherwise your movement action ends.

Cannot be used when an enemy unit is visible within 10 feet of you.
descriptionsText:
You may move up to three times your movement in a straight line and gain Trample for this movement. While under the effects of trample, you don't provoke attacks of opportunity by moving and can move into enemies that are at least one size smaller than your mount. An enemy may spend 1 RP to move out of the way to an empty spot within 5ft of them.

If they don’t move out of the way, you make a Sure Hit Light attack against the,. On damage, you knock them prone into the square you came from and keep moving, occupying the square they were in. Otherwise your movement action ends.

Cannot be used when an enemy unit is visible within 10 feet of you.

name: Bone Spike Shot
descriptionsHtml: You fire a spike from your mouth, making a Precise attack against the target. On damage, the target is pulled next to you in the most direct line possible. If the space next to you is blocked by another creature, the target is placed as closest to the original square as possible.
descriptionsText: You fire a spike from your mouth, making a Precise attack against the target. On damage, the target is pulled next to you in the most direct line possible. If the space next to you is blocked by another creature, the target is placed as closest to the original square as possible.

name: Bowling Roller
descriptionsHtml: You begin to quickly roll towards a target with little control.  You move in a straight line towards the target, immediately stopping at the first target or large object in your path and making a Heavy attack against that target.
descriptionsText: You begin to quickly roll towards a target with little control.  You move in a straight line towards the target, immediately stopping at the first target or large object in your path and making a Heavy attack against that target.

name: Burrow
descriptionsHtml: You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, you burrow yourself inside of the target. While burrowed, you shares the same space as the creature you burrowed in and move with it.
descriptionsText: You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, you burrow yourself inside of the target. While burrowed, you shares the same space as the creature you burrowed in and move with it.

name: Charge
descriptionsHtml: You may spend 2 or 4 AP on this ability and move as though you had spent that AP on movement. After you finish moving, you may spend half of the AP you used on this ability on light or heavy melee attacks.
descriptionsText: You may spend 2 or 4 AP on this ability and move as though you had spent that AP on movement. After you finish moving, you may spend half of the AP you used on this ability on light or heavy melee attacks.

name: Claw Drill
requirementsHtml: Can only be used after Vital Flurry has been used and has been canceled.
requirementsText: Can only be used after Vital Flurry has been used and has been canceled.
descriptionsHtml: You mark an enemy within range. On the start of your next turn, you may Sidestep towards them in a direct line if possible. If you do, you may immediately make 2 light attacks against the target upon arriving.
descriptionsText: You mark an enemy within range. On the start of your next turn, you may Sidestep towards them in a direct line if possible. If you do, you may immediately make 2 light attacks against the target upon arriving.

name: Cleaving Strike
descriptionsHtml: You make a Heavy attack against two different targets in range.
descriptionsText: You make a Heavy attack against two different targets in range.

name: Combine
requirementsHtml: Target must also have the Combine ability.
requirementsText: Target must also have the Combine ability.
descriptionsHtml: Combine with a compatible target slime, adding HP and MP together. This can't go over the maximum, but if this results in a slime with maximum health, it restores 1 RP too.
descriptionsText: Combine with a compatible target slime, adding HP and MP together. This can't go over the maximum, but if this results in a slime with maximum health, it restores 1 RP too.

name: Consume
descriptionsHtml: You make a light attack against the target. On hit, the target becomes rooted until they spend 1 AP, which removes all slimes that used this action. If the target took damage from this, the AP cost is increased to 2.
descriptionsText: You make a light attack against the target. On hit, the target becomes rooted until they spend 1 AP, which removes all slimes that used this action. If the target took damage from this, the AP cost is increased to 2.

name: Crab Flexibility
descriptionsHtml: You Block or Dodge an attack. Then, you automatically Dodge or Block (whichever you didn't before) against the next attack.
descriptionsText: You Block or Dodge an attack. Then, you automatically Dodge or Block (whichever you didn't before) against the next attack.

name: Crab Grab
descriptionsHtml:
You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, the target becomes rooted until it takes at least 10 damage in one attack. Medium and smaller creatures are forced to move with the crab, but large creatures grabbed by this prevent you from moving more than 5ft away.

Cannot be used against a target already grabbed.

You may let go of a target for 0 AP. You suffer the root penalty for dodging against the target (but only against the target).
descriptionsText:
You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, the target becomes rooted until it takes at least 10 damage in one attack. Medium and smaller creatures are forced to move with the crab, but large creatures grabbed by this prevent you from moving more than 5ft away.

Cannot be used against a target already grabbed.

You may let go of a target for 0 AP. You suffer the root penalty for dodging against the target (but only against the target).

name: Crushing Presence
descriptionsHtml:
You make a Light attack against all enemies within range. 

Against an enemy that's overburdened, this also gains Full Pierce.
descriptionsText:
You make a Light attack against all enemies within range.

Against an enemy that's overburdened, this also gains Full Pierce.

name: Crystal Barrier
requirementsHtml: May not have used Crystal Stomp your last turn.
requirementsText: May not have used Crystal Stomp your last turn.
descriptionsHtml: You reduce the damage you take by 5 until the start of your next turn..
descriptionsText: You reduce the damage you take by 5 until the start of your next turn..

name: Crystal Burst
requirementsHtml: Your absorb magic did not trigger since the end of your last turn.
requirementsText: Your absorb magic did not trigger since the end of your last turn.
descriptionsHtml: You make a Light attack that deals Astra damage to all enemies in range. You also take that amount of true damage and your max HP is lowered by that amount. If this reduces your mana to 0, you explode and deal an additional Sure Hit & Full Pierce heavy damage to all enemies in range, after which you die. When you die in this way, you do not drop a fiend core.
descriptionsText: You make a Light attack that deals Astra damage to all enemies in range. You also take that amount of true damage and your max HP is lowered by that amount. If this reduces your mana to 0, you explode and deal an additional Sure Hit & Full Pierce heavy damage to all enemies in range, after which you die. When you die in this way, you do not drop a fiend core.

name: Crystal Stomp
requirementsText: Your Absorb Magic triggered.
descriptionsHtml: You stomp the ground and create a shockwave, making a Light attack against all enemies in range.
descriptionsText: You stomp the ground and create a shockwave, making a Light attack against all enemies in range.

name: Cure Body
descriptionsHtml: You heal the target for 9 + Power x 3 HP. You may use either AP or RP for this ability.
descriptionsText: You heal the target for 9 + Power x 3 HP. You may use either AP or RP for this ability.

name: Cure Touch
descriptionsHtml: You heal the target for 11 + (2 x Power)
descriptionsText: You heal the target for 11 + (2 x Power)

name: Darkness
descriptionsHtml:
You conjure an area of pure darkness in a 30x30 ft area around it, centered on yourself. In the darkness, non-magical light ceases to function.

 

The darkness lasts until your next turn.
descriptionsText:
You conjure an area of pure darkness in a 30x30 ft area around it, centered on yourself. In the darkness, non-magical light ceases to function.

The darkness lasts until your next turn.

name: Darkness Shade
requirementsText: In a dark area.
descriptionsHtml: If you are in a dark area, you attempt to Hide without using AP. When hiding in darkness, you may stay hidden if you are in direct Line of Sight of others. Leaving the dark area or having any source of light illuminate the area will immediately reveal you.
descriptionsText: If you are in a dark area, you attempt to Hide without using AP. When hiding in darkness, you may stay hidden if you are in direct Line of Sight of others. Leaving the dark area or having any source of light illuminate the area will immediately reveal you.

name: Death's Follower
requirementsHtml: Can be used when you would make an attack of opportunity.
requirementsText: Can be used when you would make an attack of opportunity.
descriptionsHtml: You make a Heavy attack against the target. Afterwards, you may sidestep up to twice your speed towards the target of the attack.
descriptionsText: You make a Heavy attack against the target. Afterwards, you may sidestep up to twice your speed towards the target of the attack.

name: Defensive Curl
descriptionsHtml:
You folds yourself, entering a defensive stance. While in this stance, you can use the Block reaction for 0 RP. You cannot willingly end the stance and cannot make reaction attacks while on it.

 

The stance lasts until the end of the current creature’s turn.
descriptionsText:
You folds yourself, entering a defensive stance. While in this stance, you can use the Block reaction for 0 RP. You cannot willingly end the stance and cannot make reaction attacks while on it.

The stance lasts until the end of the current creature’s turn.

name: Desync
requirementsHtml: Can only be used after successfully dodging an attack.
requirementsText: Can only be used after successfully dodging an attack.
descriptionsHtml: You teleport up to 20ft.
descriptionsText: You teleport up to 20ft.

name: Detonate Self
requirementsText: Must be at 0 HP or lower.
descriptionsHtml: When you reach 0 HP, you will begin to explode. This explosion happens at the start of the turn of the character who triggered this effect. When it does, the Efreet may make a Heavy attack against all creatures within range.
descriptionsText: When you reach 0 HP, you will begin to explode. This explosion happens at the start of the turn of the character who triggered this effect. When it does, the Efreet may make a Heavy attack against all creatures within range.

name: Devastating Strike
requirementsText: Target must have 0 RP remaining.
descriptionsHtml: You make a Light attack against the target.
descriptionsText: You make a Light attack against the target.

name: Devour Corpse
descriptionsHtml: You eat a nearby corpse, instantly devouring it and removing it from the field. You gain +2 AP and your maximum AP is increased by 2 until the end of the encounter.
descriptionsText: You eat a nearby corpse, instantly devouring it and removing it from the field. You gain +2 AP and your maximum AP is increased by 2 until the end of the encounter.

name: Dig Deeper
requirementsText: Must be buried inside a creature.
descriptionsHtml: You deal maximum Light damage to the target. If you used this ability on your previous turn, it deals double the damage it dealt last time.
descriptionsText: You deal maximum Light damage to the target. If you used this ability on your previous turn, it deals double the damage it dealt last time.

name: Digestion
requirementsText: Affected by Gluttony.
descriptionsHtml: You attempt to digest all targets affected by Gluttony. Dealing 20 (type) damage with sure hit and full pierce.
descriptionsText: You attempt to digest all targets affected by Gluttony. Dealing 20 (type) damage with sure hit and full pierce.

name: Dire Claw
descriptionsHtml:
Your eyes flash into an aura sight temporarily and make a Heavy attack against the target. This attack deals double Heavy damage, but the damage is reduced to 1 i the target blocks.

If the target does not react to this attack, it gains Sure Hit.
descriptionsText:
Your eyes flash into an aura sight temporarily and make a Heavy attack against the target. This attack deals double Heavy damage, but the damage is reduced to 1 i the target blocks.

If the target does not react to this attack, it gains Sure Hit.

name: Disengaging Shot
descriptionsHtml: You make a ranged weapon Heavy attack against an enemy in range that does not provoke attacks of opportunity. Afterwards, you may sidestep up to your speed.
descriptionsText: You make a ranged weapon Heavy attack against an enemy in range that does not provoke attacks of opportunity. Afterwards, you may sidestep up to your speed.

name: Dive Attack
requirementsText: Must be flying.
descriptionsHtml:
You move up to 40ft towards a target within range and then make a Light attack against it. On damage, you do not provoke attacks of opportunity for the rest of your turn and may move up to your movement speed at the end of your turn without spending AP.

 

If this attack fails to do damage,you lose your Flight ability and become Grounded until the start of its next turn.
descriptionsText:
You move up to 40ft towards a target within range and then make a Light attack against it. On damage, you do not provoke attacks of opportunity for the rest of your turn and may move up to your movement speed at the end of your turn without spending AP.

If this attack fails to do damage,you lose your Flight ability and become Grounded until the start of its next turn.

name: Divine Shield
descriptionsHtml: You automatically use the Block action against the next attack targeting you.
descriptionsText: You automatically use the Block action against the next attack targeting you.

name: Divine Smite
descriptionsHtml: You make a Heavy attack that deals Holy damage against the target. Against Demons in their Divine Release state, this attack gains Full Pierce and does maximum damage instead of rolling.
descriptionsText: You make a Heavy attack that deals Holy damage against the target. Against Demons in their Divine Release state, this attack gains Full Pierce and does maximum damage instead of rolling.

name: Draining Touch
descriptionsHtml: You touch the target and attempt to steal its strength, making a Light attack against the target. On damage, you gain a bonus to your Power for your next attack this turn equal to the target's Power. The target's Power becomes 0 until after its next attack.
descriptionsText: You touch the target and attempt to steal its strength, making a Light attack against the target. On damage, you gain a bonus to your Power for your next attack this turn equal to the target's Power. The target's Power becomes 0 until after its next attack.

name: Dream Ender
requirementsHtml: Target must be trapped by Nightmare Cage
requirementsText: Target must be trapped by Nightmare Cage
descriptionsHtml: You kill the target and regain all your HP.
descriptionsText: You kill the target and regain all your HP.

name: Dream Shift
descriptionsHtml:
You change your own form or the dreamscape to something that frightens or surprises the targets. All creatures within range must make a Save or become Shaken.

What a creature targeted by this sees is unique to each creature.
descriptionsText:
You change your own form or the dreamscape to something that frightens or surprises the targets. All creatures within range must make a Save or become Shaken.

What a creature targeted by this sees is unique to each creature.

name: Drop in pot
requirementsHtml: Can only be used as the first action in a turn, must have a grabbed creature.
requirementsText: Can only be used as the first action in a turn, must have a grabbed creature.
descriptionsHtml: Drop a creature rooted by your vine grab in your pitcher. The creature becomes stunned and takes Heavy full piercing damage at the start of its turn until you die.
descriptionsText: Drop a creature rooted by your vine grab in your pitcher. The creature becomes stunned and takes Heavy full piercing damage at the start of its turn until you die.

name: Empower Beast
requirementsText: Target must be summoned by you.
descriptionsHtml: You empower a chosen animal, granting them +2 maximum AP and AP recovery until the end of the encounter.
descriptionsText: You empower a chosen animal, granting them +2 maximum AP and AP recovery until the end of the encounter.

name: Esoteric Art: All Out
requirementsText: Mount must be dead.
descriptionsHtml: You discard your armor and shield and focus on offense. You reduce your Guard and Block to 0, but gain an additional 2 AP per turn.
descriptionsText: You discard your armor and shield and focus on offense. You reduce your Guard and Block to 0, but gain an additional 2 AP per turn.

name: Evasive Maneuver
descriptionsHtml: You move 5ft in any direction and do not trigger any Attacks of Opportunity from this movement.
descriptionsText: You move 5ft in any direction and do not trigger any Attacks of Opportunity from this movement.

name: Evasive Maneuver II
descriptionsHtml: You may Sidestep 5ft.
descriptionsText: You may Sidestep 5ft.

name: Exousiai's Presence
descriptionsHtml:
You raise the astra level in the zone by 1. All enemies within range that do not have enough resistance to negate this immediately suffer negative effects.

Any creatures suffering from Astra Poisoning immediately have their Astra Poisoning worsened by 1 stage.
descriptionsText:
You raise the astra level in the zone by 1. All enemies within range that do not have enough resistance to negate this immediately suffer negative effects.

Any creatures suffering from Astra Poisoning immediately have their Astra Poisoning worsened by 1 stage.

name: Explode Self
requirementsText: Must be at 0 HP or lower.
descriptionsHtml: You make a Precise attack that deals fire damage against all creatures within range. This attack deals Heavy damage instead of its normal damage.
descriptionsText: You make a Precise attack that deals fire damage against all creatures within range. This attack deals Heavy damage instead of its normal damage.

name: Faewolf Flash
descriptionsHtml: You teleport in a brief glow of eerie light to any unoccupied spot within 40 ft. Your next Heavy attack this turn costs 0 AP.
descriptionsText: You teleport in a brief glow of eerie light to any unoccupied spot within 40 ft. Your next Heavy attack this turn costs 0 AP.

name: Feast
requirementsText: Target is Rooted.
descriptionsHtml:
You prepare to eat a rooted target. When the setup finishes, you make a Heavy attack that deals maximum damage. On damage, you eat the target. The target becomes Stunned inside you. At the start of each of its turns, it takes Heavy full pierce damage until you die.

 

Any attacks made from inside you gains Sure Hit, Full Pierce and deals double damage.
descriptionsText:
You prepare to eat a rooted target. When the setup finishes, you make a Heavy attack that deals maximum damage. On damage, you eat the target. The target becomes Stunned inside you. At the start of each of its turns, it takes Heavy full pierce damage until you die.

Any attacks made from inside you gains Sure Hit, Full Pierce and deals double damage.

name: Fireball
descriptionsHtml: You make a Light attack against every creature in a 15x15 ft square. On damage, a target becomes Burning X, where X is your Power x 3.
descriptionsText: You make a Light attack against every creature in a 15x15 ft square. On damage, a target becomes Burning X, where X is your Power x 3.

name: Firebolt
descriptionsHtml: You make a Light (1 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) attack against the target. On damage, the target becomes Burning X, where X is your Power x 3.
descriptionsText: You make a Light (1 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) attack against the target. On damage, the target becomes Burning X, where X is your Power x 3.

name: Flame Breath
descriptionsHtml: You breathe fire in a 30ft cone, making a Light attack against all creatures in it. On damage, a target becomes Burning X, where X is your Power x 3.
descriptionsText: You breathe fire in a 30ft cone, making a Light attack against all creatures in it. On damage, a target becomes Burning X, where X is your Power x 3.

name: Focus Fire
descriptionsHtml: You mark an enemy as the target until the start of your next turn. All Grunt level allies under your command must attack that target if they are able to do so without moving. They gain a +1 Power bonus to attacks against this target.
descriptionsText: You mark an enemy as the target until the start of your next turn. All Grunt level allies under your command must attack that target if they are able to do so without moving. They gain a +1 Power bonus to attacks against this target.

name: Focused Gaze
requirementsHtml: Target suffered an agility penalty due to Petrifying Gaze.
requirementsText: Target suffered an agility penalty due to Petrifying Gaze.
descriptionsHtml: The target suffers a -1 penalty to their agility. Can stack.
descriptionsText: The target suffers a -1 penalty to their agility. Can stack.

name: Frost Creation: Tower
descriptionsHtml:
You summon a 10ft high frosty tower within range. The tower has 45 HP, 4 guard and no reactions. Attacks against the tower always hit.

The tower acts at initiative 0, at the end of a round. When it does, it makes a single light attack using the your stats at every enemy within 20ft of it. This attack has half pierce, deals Frost damage and on damage, the enemy is Slowed until the end of their next turn.
descriptionsText:
You summon a 10ft high frosty tower within range. The tower has 45 HP, 4 guard and no reactions. Attacks against the tower always hit.

The tower acts at initiative 0, at the end of a round. When it does, it makes a single light attack using the your stats at every enemy within 20ft of it. This attack has half pierce, deals Frost damage and on damage, the enemy is Slowed until the end of their next turn.

name: Frosty Start
descriptionsHtml: Your initiative increases by 5. You may summon 1 tower described in ‘Frost Creation: Tower’ anywhere within range.
descriptionsText: Your initiative increases by 5. You may summon 1 tower described in ‘Frost Creation: Tower’ anywhere within range.

name: Full Petrify
requirementsText: Target has 0 or lower agility.
descriptionsHtml:
The target becomes temporarily petrified until the end of the encounter.

 

A petrified creature has 0 AP and RP and can take no actions, but gains a guard bonus of +10.

 

If the basilisk is not defeated at the encounter conclusion phase, the petrification becomes permanent.
descriptionsText:
The target becomes temporarily petrified until the end of the encounter.

A petrified creature has 0 AP and RP and can take no actions, but gains a guard bonus of +10.

If the basilisk is not defeated at the encounter conclusion phase, the petrification becomes permanent.

name: Ghoul Bite
descriptionsHtml: You attempt to bite a target creature making a Heavy attack against them. You heal for the damage this attack deals.
descriptionsText: You attempt to bite a target creature making a Heavy attack against them. You heal for the damage this attack deals.

name: Glittershards
descriptionsHtml: Numerous sparkling arcane crystals swarm the area and block line of sight.  Targets inside of or within 5ft of the Glittershards can only see up to 5ft into or out of Glittershards.  Glittershards lasts for up to 10 minutes and you can only have 1 Glittershards active at a time.  You can end this effect for 0 AP on your turn.
descriptionsText: Numerous sparkling arcane crystals swarm the area and block line of sight.  Targets inside of or within 5ft of the Glittershards can only see up to 5ft into or out of Glittershards.  Glittershards lasts for up to 10 minutes and you can only have 1 Glittershards active at a time.  You can end this effect for 0 AP on your turn.

name: Gluttony
descriptionsHtml: You attempt to consume a target, making a Heavy Attack against the target.  On hit, the target is affected by Gluttony and becomes engulfed in slime.  An engulfed target becomes Weakened.  An ally can attempt to pull a consumed target from the slime with a DC20 Power Check, removing the effects of Gluttony.
descriptionsText: You attempt to consume a target, making a Heavy Attack against the target.  On hit, the target is affected by Gluttony and becomes engulfed in slime.  An engulfed target becomes Weakened.  An ally can attempt to pull a consumed target from the slime with a DC20 Power Check, removing the effects of Gluttony.

name: Go for the Throat
requirementsText: The target is Prone.
descriptionsHtml: You make a Heavy Attack against the target.
descriptionsText: You make a Heavy Attack against the target.

name: Gobbo Regeneration
descriptionsHtml: You heal yourself for 15+Toughness HP
descriptionsText: You heal yourself for 15+Toughness HP

name: Gobbo Throw Rock
descriptionsHtml: You deal 2 true damage to the target.
descriptionsText: You deal 2 true damage to the target.

name: Goring Charge
descriptionsHtml:
You lower your head as you charge and look to crash into either the target or an obstacle barring your path. Any object that is not made of sufficiently thick metal or stone (DM Discretion) is destroyed in the charge. Any creature behind said object is immediately knocked Prone and takes Light damage.

If this attack hits a creature, you will make a Heavy attack on the target. When using more than 2 AP on this movement, you gain an additional 1 focus and 2 power on this attack. On damage if the creature has less toughness than you, they are immediately knocked Prone and Dazed.
descriptionsText:
You lower your head as you charge and look to crash into either the target or an obstacle barring your path. Any object that is not made of sufficiently thick metal or stone (DM Discretion) is destroyed in the charge. Any creature behind said object is immediately knocked Prone and takes Light damage.

If this attack hits a creature, you will make a Heavy attack on the target. When using more than 2 AP on this movement, you gain an additional 1 focus and 2 power on this attack. On damage if the creature has less toughness than you, they are immediately knocked Prone and Dazed.

name: Grab
descriptionsHtml:
You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, you and the target are both Rooted.

The target may spend 1 AP to break free, after which the target and you are both no longer rooted. If the target is grabbed by multiple enemies through this ability, spending the 1 AP will free it from all grabs.
descriptionsText:
You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, you and the target are both Rooted.

The target may spend 1 AP to break free, after which the target and you are both no longer rooted. If the target is grabbed by multiple enemies through this ability, spending the 1 AP will free it from all grabs.

name: Gravity Crash
requirementsText: An enemy in range is overburdened.
descriptionsHtml: You make a Heavy attack against all enemies within range.
descriptionsText: You make a Heavy attack against all enemies within range.

name: Gravity Pull
descriptionsHtml: You pull every enemy within range up to 40ft.
descriptionsText: You pull every enemy within range up to 40ft.

name: Hallowed Ground
descriptionsHtml: You bless the ground in a 10ft radius around yourself. Allies in the blessed ground regain HP equal to their Toughness when they spend an RP. The blessed ground remains set in place, even when you move.
descriptionsText: You bless the ground in a 10ft radius around yourself. Allies in the blessed ground regain HP equal to their Toughness when they spend an RP. The blessed ground remains set in place, even when you move.

name: Headbutt
requirementsHtml: Landing a normal Light or Heavy attack
requirementsText: Landing a normal Light or Heavy attack
descriptionsHtml: On dealing damage with a melee attack, you can follow-up with a headbutt as a Light attack. On damage the target is Unbalanced.
descriptionsText: On dealing damage with a melee attack, you can follow-up with a headbutt as a Light attack. On damage the target is Unbalanced.

name: Heat Wave
descriptionsHtml: All creatures within range must make a save or take Light Fire damage.
descriptionsText: All creatures within range must make a save or take Light Fire damage.

name: Homing Shot
range: Ranged Weapon Range or Thrown Weapon Range
descriptionsHtml: You make a heavy attack against the target  with a ranged weapon or a thrown weapon.
descriptionsText: You make a heavy attack against the target  with a ranged weapon or a thrown weapon.

name: Hydra Breath
descriptionsHtml: You breathe in a 30ft cone, making a Light attack against all targets in it. The damage type is based on the head’s element. On damage, you apply an effect based on the head’s element. The Earth head inflicts Daze for 1 turn, the Frost head inflicts Slowed for 1 turn and the Lightning head inflicts Static X for 1 turn, where X is your Power x 3.
descriptionsText: You breathe in a 30ft cone, making a Light attack against all targets in it. The damage type is based on the head’s element. On damage, you apply an effect based on the head’s element. The Earth head inflicts Daze for 1 turn, the Frost head inflicts Slowed for 1 turn and the Lightning head inflicts Static X for 1 turn, where X is your Power x 3.

name: Hydra Constrict
descriptionsHtml: You and the target both become rooted. The target may spend 2 AP to break free, after which the target and you are both no longer rooted.
descriptionsText: You and the target both become rooted. The target may spend 2 AP to break free, after which the target and you are both no longer rooted.

name: Impale
descriptionsHtml:
You make a Heavy attack against the target. On damage, the target becomes rooted until the start of your next turn.

Combo: If used after Black Knight’s Charge, this ability’s cost is reduced to 1 AP and the attack gains Full Pierce.
descriptionsText:
You make a Heavy attack against the target. On damage, the target becomes rooted until the start of your next turn.

Combo: If used after Black Knight’s Charge, this ability’s cost is reduced to 1 AP and the attack gains Full Pierce.

name: Improved Feint
descriptionsHtml: You do not provoke attacks of opportunity from the target.
descriptionsText: You do not provoke attacks of opportunity from the target.

name: Ink Attack
requirementsHtml: You and the target must both be standing on Ink.
requirementsText: You and the target must both be standing on Ink.
descriptionsHtml: You make a Light (1 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) attack against the target.
descriptionsText: You make a Light (1 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) attack against the target.

name: Inky Dodge
requirementsHtml: You are the target of an attack.
requirementsText: You are the target of an attack.
descriptionsHtml: You take the Dodge action against the triggering attack, then teleport up to 40ft.
descriptionsText: You take the Dodge action against the triggering attack, then teleport up to 40ft.

name: Insect Assault
descriptionsHtml: You make a Light attack against the target that deals Physical(Piercing) damage.
descriptionsText: You make a Light attack against the target that deals Physical(Piercing) damage.

name: Ixilune's Command
descriptionsHtml:
You move one of your Swarms up to 20ft or you may Sidestep an ally up to 20ft.

You may also spend 1 RP to use this ability instead.
descriptionsText:
You move one of your Swarms up to 20ft or you may Sidestep an ally up to 20ft.

You may also spend 1 RP to use this ability instead.

name: Ixith Swarm
descriptionsHtml:
You summon a swarm of insects in a 15x15 square. Any creature except for you, a devouring swarm or a summoner contracted to you ending their turn inside of it takes Full Pierce Light damage.

You may have up to two of these swarms active at the same time.
descriptionsText:
You summon a swarm of insects in a 15x15 square. Any creature except for you, a devouring swarm or a summoner contracted to you ending their turn inside of it takes Full Pierce Light damage.

You may have up to two of these swarms active at the same time.

name: Jumping Bite
descriptionsHtml: You leap out from below that ground and make a Heavy attack against the target.
descriptionsText: You leap out from below that ground and make a Heavy attack against the target.

name: Leading Bite
descriptionsHtml: You make a Light attack against the target. Afterwards, all allied Wolves may move up to their movement speed closer to the target.
descriptionsText: You make a Light attack against the target. Afterwards, all allied Wolves may move up to their movement speed closer to the target.

name: Leaping Strike
descriptionsHtml: You jump to a target within range and make a Light attack against it.
descriptionsText: You jump to a target within range and make a Light attack against it.

name: Lightning Charge
descriptionsHtml: You turn into a ball of lightning and Sidestep in a straight line to a square within range. You can pass through units while doing so and may make a Light attack against each unit you pass through. This attack deals Lightning damage.
descriptionsText: You turn into a ball of lightning and Sidestep in a straight line to a square within range. You can pass through units while doing so and may make a Light attack against each unit you pass through. This attack deals Lightning damage.

name: Lion's Roar
descriptionsHtml: All enemies within range must make a Save or become Unbalanced. They also become Slowed until the end of your next turn.
descriptionsText: All enemies within range must make a Save or become Unbalanced. They also become Slowed until the end of your next turn.

name: Luck Surge
descriptionsHtml: The target must reroll their roll. Can not be used on a roll that was already rerolled.
descriptionsText: The target must reroll their roll. Can not be used on a roll that was already rerolled.

name: Lucky Dodge
requirementsHtml: You are the target of an attack.
requirementsText: You are the target of an attack.
descriptionsHtml:
You may Sidestep 5ft and the attack against you automatically misses.

Roll a d20. If you roll 11 or higher, you recover 2 RP.
descriptionsText:
You may Sidestep 5ft and the attack against you automatically misses.

Roll a d20. If you roll 11 or higher, you recover 2 RP.

name: Lucky Hit
descriptionsHtml: You make a Heavy attack against the target. If the attack hits, it is automatically a critical hit.
descriptionsText: You make a Heavy attack against the target. If the attack hits, it is automatically a critical hit.

name: Lucky Lass
descriptionsHtml: You shoot a golden coin at an enemy, making a Light attack against the target that deals 2d10 Astra damage, but doesn’t receive bonuses from power.
descriptionsText: You shoot a golden coin at an enemy, making a Light attack against the target that deals 2d10 Astra damage, but doesn’t receive bonuses from power.

name: Luring Pollen
requirementsText: Target must be further than 10ft away.
descriptionsHtml: Any creature within range that’s more than 10ft away from the you must make a save. If they fail, they must spend AP on their next turn to move as close to you as possible. Once they are within 5ft of you, the effect ends.
descriptionsText: Any creature within range that’s more than 10ft away from the you must make a save. If they fail, they must spend AP on their next turn to move as close to you as possible. Once they are within 5ft of you, the effect ends.

name: Mana Razor Alpha
descriptionsHtml: Your melee attacks gain an additional 60ft range. They are still counted as melee attacks and do not provoke attacks of opportunity.
descriptionsText: Your melee attacks gain an additional 60ft range. They are still counted as melee attacks and do not provoke attacks of opportunity.

name: Maul
descriptionsHtml: You makes a Heavy attack against the target that deals maximum Heavy damage. This attack automatically misses if the target uses the Dodge reaction.
descriptionsText: You makes a Heavy attack against the target that deals maximum Heavy damage. This attack automatically misses if the target uses the Dodge reaction.

name: Missile Barrage
descriptionsHtml: You make a Light attack that deals Arcane damage to all enemies within range.
descriptionsText: You make a Light attack that deals Arcane damage to all enemies within range.

name: Mounted Charge
requirementsText: Must be mounted.
descriptionsHtml:
You may move up to twice your movement in a straight line towards a target further than 20ft away and gain Trample after moving at least 20ft. While under the effects of trample, you don't provoke attacks of opportunity by moving and you can move into enemies that are at least one size smaller than your mount. An enemy may spend 1 RP to move out of the way to an empty spot within 5ft of them.

If they don’t move out of the way, you make a Sure Hit Light attack against them. On damage, you knock them prone into the square you came from and keep moving, occupying the square they were in. Otherwise your movement action ends.

When you reach the target you make a Heavy attack against them
descriptionsText:
You may move up to twice your movement in a straight line towards a target further than 20ft away and gain Trample after moving at least 20ft. While under the effects of trample, you don't provoke attacks of opportunity by moving and you can move into enemies that are at least one size smaller than your mount. An enemy may spend 1 RP to move out of the way to an empty spot within 5ft of them.

If they don’t move out of the way, you make a Sure Hit Light attack against them. On damage, you knock them prone into the square you came from and keep moving, occupying the square they were in. Otherwise your movement action ends.

When you reach the target you make a Heavy attack against them

name: Nightmare Cage
descriptionsHtml:
You trap the target in a magical cage and teleport them next to you. The target becomes Stunned.

The cage can be targeted by attacks. Attacks against it cannot miss, it has 55 HP, no reactions and has a base guard of 0. When its HP reaches 0 or if your HP reaches 0, the cage is destroyed.

When the cage is destroyed, the trapped target may immediately take a turn after the current creature’s turn has ended, regardless of their initiative. They do double damage during this turn. Their initiative does not change based on this immediate turn.
descriptionsText:
You trap the target in a magical cage and teleport them next to you. The target becomes Stunned.

The cage can be targeted by attacks. Attacks against it cannot miss, it has 55 HP, no reactions and has a base guard of 0. When its HP reaches 0 or if your HP reaches 0, the cage is destroyed.

When the cage is destroyed, the trapped target may immediately take a turn after the current creature’s turn has ended, regardless of their initiative. They do double damage during this turn. Their initiative does not change based on this immediate turn.

name: Nothing
descriptionsHtml: Placeholder ability so site doesn't break
descriptionsText: Placeholder ability so site doesn't break

name: Oppressing Glare
requirementsHtml: Can only be used the turn after The Blur breaks for the first time.
requirementsText: Can only be used the turn after The Blur breaks for the first time.
descriptionsHtml:
All enemies must make a save against your potency (10+Focus) or become stricken with irrational fear. While feared, all their attacks targeting you cost +1 AP and you gain +4 to hit against them.

This debuff lasts until they hit you or you dodge or block one of their attacks.
descriptionsText:
All enemies must make a save against your potency (10+Focus) or become stricken with irrational fear. While feared, all their attacks targeting you cost +1 AP and you gain +4 to hit against them.

This debuff lasts until they hit you or you dodge or block one of their attacks.

name: Perfect Shell
descriptionsHtml: You Block a ranged attack, as long as the accuracy roll is below your Dodge value.
descriptionsText: You Block a ranged attack, as long as the accuracy roll is below your Dodge value.

name: Poison Bite
descriptionsHtml: You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, the target becomes Dazed. If the target is already dazed, it takes 8 full pierce Poison damage instead.
descriptionsText: You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, the target becomes Dazed. If the target is already dazed, it takes 8 full pierce Poison damage instead.

name: Poison Spore
requirementsText: You took damage.
descriptionsHtml:
You release poisonous spores in a 5ft radius around you that last until the start of your next turn. Any creature that ends their turn inside the spores takes full pierce Poison damage equal to your Power + 3.

Poison Spores from multiple mushrooms can stack.
descriptionsText:
You release poisonous spores in a 5ft radius around you that last until the start of your next turn. Any creature that ends their turn inside the spores takes full pierce Poison damage equal to your Power + 3.

Poison Spores from multiple mushrooms can stack.

name: Poisonous Bite
descriptionsHtml: You make a Light (1 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) attack against the target. On damage, the target must succeed on a save or become Weakened until the end of their next turn. A character that is already weakened takes an additional 5 (Light) or 10 (Heavy) full-pierce Poison damage instead.
descriptionsText: You make a Light (1 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) attack against the target. On damage, the target must succeed on a save or become Weakened until the end of their next turn. A character that is already weakened takes an additional 5 (Light) or 10 (Heavy) full-pierce Poison damage instead.

name: Poltergeist
descriptionsHtml: You throw an unattended object within range at a target within range, making either a Light (1 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) attack that deals normal listed damage. You do not need to physically interact with the object to throw it.
descriptionsText: You throw an unattended object within range at a target within range, making either a Light (1 AP) or Heavy (2 AP) attack that deals normal listed damage. You do not need to physically interact with the object to throw it.

name: Pounce
descriptionsHtml: You may move up to twice your speed towards an enemy and then make 2 AP worth of attacks against them.
descriptionsText: You may move up to twice your speed towards an enemy and then make 2 AP worth of attacks against them.

name: Power Strike
descriptionsHtml: You make a Light (1 AP), Heavy (2 AP) or Precise (2 AP) attack against the enemy.
descriptionsText: You make a Light (1 AP), Heavy (2 AP) or Precise (2 AP) attack against the enemy.

name: Provoke
descriptionsHtml: Until the start of your next turn, the target is Challenged by you.
descriptionsText: Until the start of your next turn, the target is Challenged by you.

name: Queen's Domain
descriptionsHtml:
You shape the area around you to be like that of your hive. The area within 20ft of you gains the following properties:

  • You gain Tremorsense in your hive area, becoming aware of the exact location of all creatures touching the ground.
  • Any non-flying creature except for you, a devouring swarm or a summoner contracted to you is slowed in the area. 
  • When an enemy dies while in the domain, you may choose to spawn an Ixith swarm in that location without paying the normal cost as a swarm bursts from the corpse. These do not count against your normal limits. In addition, when an enemy dies in your domain you heal for your Toughness x2

Upkeep: 1 Mana. When you pay upkeep, you may increase the radius of your hive by 10ft.
descriptionsText:
You shape the area around you to be like that of your hive. The area within 20ft of you gains the following properties:

- You gain Tremorsense in your hive area, becoming aware of the exact location of all creatures touching the ground.
- Any non-flying creature except for you, a devouring swarm or a summoner contracted to you is slowed in the area.
- When an enemy dies while in the domain, you may choose to spawn an Ixith swarm in that location without paying the normal cost as a swarm bursts from the corpse. These do not count against your normal limits. In addition, when an enemy dies in your domain you heal for your Toughness x2
Upkeep: 1 Mana. When you pay upkeep, you may increase the radius of your hive by 10ft.

name: Raise Shield
descriptionsHtml: Your next Block action against an enemy Challenged by you costs 0 RP.
descriptionsText: Your next Block action against an enemy Challenged by you costs 0 RP.

name: Reposition
descriptionsHtml: You choose a Grunt level willing ally within range. That ally may sidestep up to twice their movement speed.
descriptionsText: You choose a Grunt level willing ally within range. That ally may sidestep up to twice their movement speed.

name: Resync Bite
requirementsHtml: Can only be used after teleporting with Desync.
requirementsText: Can only be used after teleporting with Desync.
descriptionsHtml: You make a light attack against a target within range.
descriptionsText: You make a light attack against a target within range.

name: Reverberant Frost
descriptionsHtml: All frost towers created by ‘Frost Creation: Tower’ within range immediately take action, making their single attack listed in the ability.
descriptionsText: All frost towers created by ‘Frost Creation: Tower’ within range immediately take action, making their single attack listed in the ability.

name: Rock Crunching Bite
descriptionsHtml: You make a Heavy attack against the target. You don’t add your focus to this roll.
descriptionsText: You make a Heavy attack against the target. You don’t add your focus to this roll.

name: Self Icicle Nail
descriptionsHtml: You curl up into a spike shape and fly towards an enemy. You sidestep to and make a Light attack against an enemy within range.
descriptionsText: You curl up into a spike shape and fly towards an enemy. You sidestep to and make a Light attack against an enemy within range.

name: Shards of Ice
descriptionsHtml: You fire a shard of ice at every enemy within range, making a Light attack against them that deals Frost damage. This attack gains full-pierce against any enemy that is slowed.
descriptionsText: You fire a shard of ice at every enemy within range, making a Light attack against them that deals Frost damage. This attack gains full-pierce against any enemy that is slowed.

name: Skeletal Arm Sweep
requirementsText: At least 1 arm still alive
descriptionsHtml:
You make a Light attack against the target and any enemies adjacent to it. On damage, they are knocked back 20ft.

If at least 3 arms are still alive, you may repeat this attack against a different target within range.
descriptionsText:
You make a Light attack against the target and any enemies adjacent to it. On damage, they are knocked back 20ft.

If at least 3 arms are still alive, you may repeat this attack against a different target within range.

name: Skeletal Armblade Barrage
requirementsText: At least 1 arm still alive.
descriptionsHtml: You make a Light attack against the target. This attack deals Light damage X amount of times, where X is the amount of arms still alive (Max 4). These are considered separate instances of damage, so you don’t add the damage together before subtracting the guard from it.
descriptionsText: You make a Light attack against the target. This attack deals Light damage X amount of times, where X is the amount of arms still alive (Max 4). These are considered separate instances of damage, so you don’t add the damage together before subtracting the guard from it.

name: Skullsplitter
descriptionsHtml: You make a Heavy attack against the target.
descriptionsText: You make a Heavy attack against the target.

name: Slam
descriptionsHtml: You make a Light attack against the target  On damage, the target is moved 5ft away from you if the target is no more than twice your size.
descriptionsText: You make a Light attack against the target  On damage, the target is moved 5ft away from you if the target is no more than twice your size.

name: Slice & Dice
requirementsHtml: You must have dealt damage to the target this turn.
requirementsText: You must have dealt damage to the target this turn.
descriptionsHtml: You may make two Light attacks against the target.
descriptionsText: You may make two Light attacks against the target.

name: Slime Body II
descriptionsHtml: You gain Damage Reduction 100 against physical damage from the triggering attack
descriptionsText: You gain Damage Reduction 100 against physical damage from the triggering attack

name: Sludge Blast
descriptionsHtml:
You fire a blast of black sludge at the enemy. You make a Light attack against the enemy, dealing Astra damage on hit.

You may spend 2 AP to make a Heavy or Precise attack instead.
descriptionsText:
You fire a blast of black sludge at the enemy. You make a Light attack against the enemy, dealing Astra damage on hit.

You may spend 2 AP to make a Heavy or Precise attack instead.

name: SMASH YOU
descriptionsHtml: You make a Heavy attack against the target. If the target has less toughness than the Ogre’s power, they become dazed.
descriptionsText: You make a Heavy attack against the target. If the target has less toughness than the Ogre’s power, they become dazed.

name: SMASH YOU MORE
descriptionsHtml: After successfully Dazing a target with SMASH YOU , you make an additional Heavy Attack on the target and on unguarded hit the target is knocked Prone.
descriptionsText: After successfully Dazing a target with SMASH YOU , you make an additional Heavy Attack on the target and on unguarded hit the target is knocked Prone.

name: Snap Shot
range: Ranged Weapon Range or Thrown Weapon Range
descriptionsHtml: You may make a heavy attack against the target  with a ranged weapon or a thrown weapon.  You do not add your focus to the accuracy roll.
descriptionsText: You may make a heavy attack against the target  with a ranged weapon or a thrown weapon.  You do not add your focus to the accuracy roll.

name: Snow Assassin
descriptionsHtml:
The frost maiden may Sidestep up to double her speed. Afterwards, she may make a Heavy attack against a target. If she was hidden from the target before moving, the target cannot react to the attack.

 

Cannot be used in the same turn as Blizzard Walker.
descriptionsText:
The frost maiden may Sidestep up to double her speed. Afterwards, she may make a Heavy attack against a target. If she was hidden from the target before moving, the target cannot react to the attack.

Cannot be used in the same turn as Blizzard Walker.

name: Spectral Touch
descriptionsHtml: You attempt to attack the soul of the target with a touch, making a Heavy attack against the target.
descriptionsText: You attempt to attack the soul of the target with a touch, making a Heavy attack against the target.

name: Spore Launch
descriptionsHtml: You fire poisonous spores towards an area. All within a 15x15ft area must make a save or take Power full pierce poison damage and become poisoned. The deathcap poison makes the target Sickened while it lasts.
descriptionsText: You fire poisonous spores towards an area. All within a 15x15ft area must make a save or take Power full pierce poison damage and become poisoned. The deathcap poison makes the target Sickened while it lasts.

name: Squeeze
requirementsText: Target must be grabbed by you.
descriptionsHtml: The target must make a Save or take Heavy damage.
descriptionsText: The target must make a Save or take Heavy damage.

name: Static Field
descriptionsHtml:
You creater a field of lightning around yourself. Any creature that ends its turn within 5ft of you gains Static X, where X is your power x 2.

The range of the field is increased to 10ft during a storm.
descriptionsText:
You creater a field of lightning around yourself. Any creature that ends its turn within 5ft of you gains Static X, where X is your power x 2.

The range of the field is increased to 10ft during a storm.

name: Stone Form
descriptionsHtml:
You turn yourself to hardened stone, gaining a +10 guard bonus but becoming unable to take any actions. All attacks made against you automatically hit, but cannot crit. You may cancel this effect at the start of your turn.

If used while flying, you drop down to the ground without taking falling damage. Any creature within 5ft of where you land may spend 1 RP or else they take Heavy damage.
descriptionsText:
You turn yourself to hardened stone, gaining a +10 guard bonus but becoming unable to take any actions. All attacks made against you automatically hit, but cannot crit. You may cancel this effect at the start of your turn.

If used while flying, you drop down to the ground without taking falling damage. Any creature within 5ft of where you land may spend 1 RP or else they take Heavy damage.

name: Stratagem: Lightning
range: All allies in sight, including yourself.
descriptionsHtml: All allied units (including yourself) gain +1 to initiative and may immediately move up to their speed.
descriptionsText: All allied units (including yourself) gain +1 to initiative and may immediately move up to their speed.

name: Summon Beast
descriptionsHtml: You summon a Wolf, Boar, Giant Spider or Cheetah (Chosen randomly). This creature is friendly to you and you may direct its actions in combat. It acts at initiative 0. It lasts until the end of the encounter, or until either your or its HP reaches 0 or lower, after which it immediately disappears.
descriptionsText: You summon a Wolf, Boar, Giant Spider or Cheetah (Chosen randomly). This creature is friendly to you and you may direct its actions in combat. It acts at initiative 0. It lasts until the end of the encounter, or until either your or its HP reaches 0 or lower, after which it immediately disappears.

name: Sweep
descriptionsHtml: You make a Light attack against all enemies in range. On damage, they are pushed back 10ft.
descriptionsText: You make a Light attack against all enemies in range. On damage, they are pushed back 10ft.

name: Sweeping Opportunity
requirementsHtml: You hit an enemy with an Attack of Opportunity.
requirementsText: You hit an enemy with an Attack of Opportunity.
descriptionsHtml: The target falls prone.
descriptionsText: The target falls prone.

name: Swooping Strike
descriptionsHtml: You may Sidestep up to twice your speed. At any point during this movement, you may make a Light attack.
descriptionsText: You may Sidestep up to twice your speed. At any point during this movement, you may make a Light attack.

name: Swooping Strike II
descriptionsHtml: You may Sidestep up to twice your speed. At any point during this movement, you may make a Heavy attack.
descriptionsText: You may Sidestep up to twice your speed. At any point during this movement, you may make a Heavy attack.

name: Tail Spikes
descriptionsHtml: You firee a hail of spikes at a 15x15 ft area, making a Light attack against all enemies within the area. On damage, the target becomes Dazed. If the target is already Dazed, they instead take 5 poison damage.
descriptionsText: You firee a hail of spikes at a 15x15 ft area, making a Light attack against all enemies within the area. On damage, the target becomes Dazed. If the target is already Dazed, they instead take 5 poison damage.

name: Tail Swipe
descriptionsHtml: You spin around your axis and attack every creature within 10ft of you with a Light attack. On damage, a target is pushed back 15ft.
descriptionsText: You spin around your axis and attack every creature within 10ft of you with a Light attack. On damage, a target is pushed back 15ft.

name: Terrifying Roar
descriptionsHtml: All creatures that can hear the roar of the firewyrm must make a save or become Shaken. This effect lasts until the end of combat, or until the target uses 3 AP to remove the effect from themselves.
descriptionsText: All creatures that can hear the roar of the firewyrm must make a save or become Shaken. This effect lasts until the end of combat, or until the target uses 3 AP to remove the effect from themselves.

name: Threatening Aura
descriptionsHtml: Until the start of your next turn, all enemies in your melee range are considered Challenged by you.
descriptionsText: Until the start of your next turn, all enemies in your melee range are considered Challenged by you.

name: Three Headed Assault
descriptionsHtml: You and all other heads make a Light attack against the target. All heads, except for you, that made an attack regain 1 less AP on their turn.
descriptionsText: You and all other heads make a Light attack against the target. All heads, except for you, that made an attack regain 1 less AP on their turn.

name: Topple Prey
descriptionsHtml: You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, the target falls Prone.
descriptionsText: You make a Light attack against the target. On damage, the target falls Prone.

name: Transmutation Cannon (Right Arm)
descriptionsHtml: Fires a transmutation cannon, unleashing a blast of energy that deals light attack damage.  Regardless of if the attack hits or not, the target must make a save against DC 15 or be knocked back 30 feet.  If the target hits a wall or another creature, both creatures take heavy attack damage.
descriptionsText: Fires a transmutation cannon, unleashing a blast of energy that deals light attack damage.  Regardless of if the attack hits or not, the target must make a save against DC 15 or be knocked back 30 feet.  If the target hits a wall or another creature, both creatures take heavy attack damage.

name: Transmute Low Wall (Body)
descriptionsHtml: Creates a 3ft high wall that counts as difficult terrain.  The wall extends up to 120 feet and lasts for 10 minutes, or until Alchemic Flare or Transmute Low Wall are used, causing the wall to crumble.
descriptionsText: Creates a 3ft high wall that counts as difficult terrain.  The wall extends up to 120 feet and lasts for 10 minutes, or until Alchemic Flare or Transmute Low Wall are used, causing the wall to crumble.

name: Ultimate Lifeform
descriptionsHtml: You remove all stacks of one status effect from yourself.
descriptionsText: You remove all stacks of one status effect from yourself.

name: Vine Grab
requirementsHtml: Can only be used after dealing damage with a melee attack.
requirementsText: Can only be used after dealing damage with a melee attack.
descriptionsHtml:
Your vine wraps around the target, rooting it. The vine can be destroyed by attacking it. It has 14 HP and takes double damage from fire damage and Slashing attacks. It cannot make reactions, has 0 guard and attacks against it always hit.

 

A creature can be grabbed by multiple vines at the same time.
descriptionsText:
Your vine wraps around the target, rooting it. The vine can be destroyed by attacking it. It has 14 HP and takes double damage from fire damage and Slashing attacks. It cannot make reactions, has 0 guard and attacks against it always hit.

A creature can be grabbed by multiple vines at the same time.

name: Vital Flurry
requirementsHtml: Can only be used once. Can only be used after your HP reaches 50%.
requirementsText: Can only be used once. Can only be used after your HP reaches 50%.
descriptionsHtml:
You target an enemy within range and begin to rapidly slash at them. Every time you are attacked by anyone, you may make a light attack against the target of this ability. On damage, you recover 4 HP.

Lasts until you lose The Blur.
descriptionsText:
You target an enemy within range and begin to rapidly slash at them. Every time you are attacked by anyone, you may make a light attack against the target of this ability. On damage, you recover 4 HP.

Lasts until you lose The Blur.

name: Web Spray
descriptionsHtml:
You make a Light attack against the target that deals no damage, but covers the target in webs. On hit, the target becomes rooted.This effect lasts until the target or an ally spends 4 AP to remove the webbing.

 

If a creature rooted by this ability takes fire damage, the effect also disappears as the webs burn away.
descriptionsText:
You make a Light attack against the target that deals no damage, but covers the target in webs. On hit, the target becomes rooted.This effect lasts until the target or an ally spends 4 AP to remove the webbing.

If a creature rooted by this ability takes fire damage, the effect also disappears as the webs burn away.

name: Webbing
descriptionsHtml:
You cover a 30x30ft square surface in webs. All creatures in the webbed area become slowed. The webs last until this ability is used again, or until the webs take fire damage on which they are immediately destroyed. Any creature touching the webbing when it is lit on fire becomes Burning 10.

 

Any creature that ends their turn in the webbed area becomes rooted. This lasts until they or an ally spends 4 AP to free themselves. After a unit is freed from the webs, they cannot become rooted by the same web until the end of their next turn. If the webbing is destroyed, a rooted creature is also immediately freed.
descriptionsText:
You cover a 30x30ft square surface in webs. All creatures in the webbed area become slowed. The webs last until this ability is used again, or until the webs take fire damage on which they are immediately destroyed. Any creature touching the webbing when it is lit on fire becomes Burning 10.

Any creature that ends their turn in the webbed area becomes rooted. This lasts until they or an ally spends 4 AP to free themselves. After a unit is freed from the webs, they cannot become rooted by the same web until the end of their next turn. If the webbing is destroyed, a rooted creature is also immediately freed.

name: Weight of the World
descriptionsHtml:
Every enemy in range suffers +1 Burden until the end of the encounter. This can stack.

You immediately kill all grunts and summons.
descriptionsText:
Every enemy in range suffers +1 Burden until the end of the encounter. This can stack.

You immediately kill all grunts and summons.

name: Wind Blast
requirementsText: Must be flying.
descriptionsHtml: You fire a large gust of wind at a 30x30 feet square within range. You make a Heavy attack that deals Wind damage against all targets within the area. On damage, the target is blown away to the nearest edge of the square and knocked Prone.
descriptionsText: You fire a large gust of wind at a 30x30 feet square within range. You make a Heavy attack that deals Wind damage against all targets within the area. On damage, the target is blown away to the nearest edge of the square and knocked Prone.

name: Zero Impact Generator (Left Arm)
descriptionsHtml: Generates a shield with 35 HP that blocks damage to other body parts except the left arm.
descriptionsText: Generates a shield with 35 HP that blocks damage to other body parts except the left arm.
